text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water and do some light stretching to wake up my body. After a quick shower, I have a simple breakfast of oatmeal and fruit. My workday starts at 9 a.m. and ends at 5 p.m. I usually have lunch at my desk while checking emails. After work, I go for a 30-minute run in the park. It helps me stay fit and clears my mind. In the evening, I cook dinner, watch a TV show, and read for a while before bed. I always go to sleep by 10:30 p.m. This routine keeps me healthy and productive.
